name: Bank of America ATM
description_short: Bank of America's 95 Wall Street financial center offers 24/7 walk-up ATM access plus full-service banking during business hours in lower Manhattan.
description_long:
Bank of America operates a full-service financial center located at 95 Wall Street in New York City's Financial District. This location combines a traditional banking center with extended-hours ATM access, serving both individual and business customers in the area. The facility functions as a comprehensive banking hub for downtown Manhattan professionals and residents.

The location provides traditional ATM services available 24 hours daily, including cash withdrawals, deposits, and credit card payments. The walk-up ATM supports cardless transactions via tap-to-pay cards and smartphones, with instructions available in seven languages (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese). During business hours (Monday-Friday, 9 AM-4 PM), the financial center offers appointment-based specialist consultations, notary services, commercial deposits, change orders, and cash checks for non-customers. The ATM is located inside the building for weather-protected access.

This location distinguishes itself through its 24/7 ATM availability combined with daytime access to financial specialists, making it suitable for both quick cash needs and planned financial discussions. The facility's downtown location and extended hours cater specifically to the working professional demographic in the Financial District. Bank of America's mobile banking integration allows customers to conduct most transactions remotely, supplementing the in-person services.

The main limitation is that the financial center itself is closed weekends and maintains limited weekday hours (9 AM-4 PM), restricting access to specialists to business days only. The walk-up ATM provides 24/7 access but lacks the full range of services available during business hours. This location is primarily suitable for customers with weekday daytime availability or those needing only ATM services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 24/7 walk-up ATM access with no closure hours
Cardless ATM transactions via tap-to-pay cards and smartphones
ATM instructions available in seven languages
ATM accepts both deposits and credit card payments
Full-service financial center with appointment-based specialist consultations
Notary services available during business hours
Commercial deposit services for business customers
Indoor ATM location provides weather protection
cons: Financial center closed weekends and limited weekday hours (9 AM-4 PM only)
Appointments required to meet with financial specialists; no walk-in consultant availability
Location is downtown Manhattan-specific; not accessible for customers outside the Financial District without travel
best_for: Downtown Manhattan financial professionals needing weekday banking services
Bank of America customers seeking 24/7 ATM access in lower Manhattan
Business customers requiring commercial deposit services and notary functions
International customers benefiting from multilingual ATM interfaces
diagnosis: This location is best for Bank of America customers in lower Manhattan who need convenient 24/7 ATM access combined with occasional daytime access to financial specialists. The main caveat is that the financial center itself has limited hours (weekdays 9 AM-4 PM only), so customers requiring weekend banking or evening specialist consultations must use the 24/7 ATM or visit other locations.
services: ATM deposits and credit card payments
Cardless ATM transactions via tap-to-pay and smartphone
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
